# timeSinceLastUpdate

**Instance Property**

The amount of time that has passed since the last time the view controller called the delegate’s [doc://com.apple.glkit/documentation/GLKit/GLKViewControllerDelegate/glkViewControllerUpdate(_:)] method.

## Declaration

```swift
var timeSinceLastUpdate: TimeInterval { get }
```

## Obtaining Information About View Updates

- **framesDisplayed**: The number of frame updates that have been sent by the view controller since it was created.
- **timeSinceFirstResume**: The amount of time that has passed since first time the view controller resumed sending update events.
- **timeSinceLastResume**: The amount of time that has passed since the last time the view controller resumed sending update events.
- **timeSinceLastDraw**: The amount of time that has passed since the last time the view controller called the view’s [doc://com.apple.glkit/documentation/GLKit/GLKView/display()] method.
